description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular plot with a spacious backyard and a swimming pool. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan layout with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas. The exterior is surrounded by manicured lawns, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. Outdoor amenities include a pool, patio seating, and a small outbuilding or shed near the rear. The property is enclosed by a low fence, providing privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pool, patio area, and several trees along the left and right edges of the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and a clear view of the house's open-plan layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and outbuilding, with the house's flat roof and large windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dense tree coverage in the foreground, partially obscuring the house and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved approach, minimal steps, and a simple modern door, no porch or columns.
